title: reseda alba f. maritima
intro: Reseda alba f. maritima, also known as White Resin or Sea Wallflower, is a variant of the Reseda alba plant that belongs to the Borage family and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Reseda alba f. maritima include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make ointments, salves, and infusions to treat skin conditions and respiratory issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
